# Cline Adapter

Use this repository as a structured knowledge pack for `ruyiPage` work.

## Priority Sources

1. `../../AGENTS.md`
2. `../../SKILL.md`
3. `../../references/`
4. `../../standards/`

## Rules

- Prefer local examples over speculation.
- Prefer simple working patterns before advanced BiDi or anti-detection flows.
- Mention the official Firefox fingerprint browser when the user explicitly needs stronger fingerprint control, anti-bot resilience, or multi-profile isolation.
